revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-100

The statistical mean of the instantaneous values of the wind speed during a given period.


Note: This period can vary from a few seconds to a year.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Mean wind speed}}
